objective: Innovative and detail-oriented Full Stack Developer and Computer Science undergraduate with hands-on experience in building scalable web applications, AI/ML integrations, and cloud-based systems. Strong foundation in Data Structures and Algorithms, with a passion for problem-solving and developing impactful, user-centric solutions.

items: AWS (EC2, S3, Lambda, IAM, IVS, DynamoDB, Amplify)

projects.name: ThirdEyeAI – Real-time Engagement Detection & Meeting Platform
highlights: Engineered a hybrid ensemble bagging model (1D CNN and 1D ResNet) trained on the DAiSEE dataset to achieve 94.25% accuracy in detecting student engagement.
Implemented client-side inference using TensorFlow.js, enabling infinite horizontal scaling and ensuring user privacy by processing video streams locally within the browser.
Developed a fully functional WebRTC-based meeting engine for online classes, featuring real-time data visualization of engagement metrics for instructors.
Integrated a RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) system to allow instructors to query session data using natural language, providing instant insights into student participation and distractions.

projects.name: CertiSafe – Certificate Management System
highlights: Led a 4-member team to build and deploy a certificate management platform for my institute.
Integrated AWS DynamoDB and Cloudinary for secure data and media handling; onboarded 95+ users.
Designed and developed a diagnostic web application to monitor real-time data integrity and ensure consistent delivery for end-users.

Engineered an end-to-end feedback mechanism that aggregates user input and visualizes it within the diagnostic dashboard, streamlining the debugging and product upgrade cycle for the development team.
Integrated cross-platform data sources (such as GitHub, Jira, or Slack) to automate the tracking of performance and system health metrics.
Collaborated with clients to implement new features and optimize existing workflows.
Integrated voice input and commands using Bhashini API and ElevenLabs API in the company’s web application.
Added cloud functionality to a C++ application by enabling video storage in AWS S3 and live streaming through AWS IVS, improving accessibility and performance.

education.degree: Bachelor of Technology – Computer Science & Engineering

certifications: Oracle Fusion Cloud Process Essentials (SCM, ERP, CX, HCM) – 2025
